scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.eas:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && eas build -p ios --profile production --auto-submit --non-interactive
scripts.eas:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && eas build -p android --profile production --auto-submit --non-interactive
scripts.eas:preview:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && eas build -p ios --profile preview
scripts.eas:preview:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && eas build -p android --profile preview
scripts.eas-build-post-install: npm run build && npx cap sync $EAS_BUILD_PLATFORM 2>/dev/null || npm run build && npx cap sync
